subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter was received, describing the persecution by strangers against friends, and the attacks of the deprived upon the trusted ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت پیمان نامه شما رسید شرح اذیت بیگانگان باشنایان و تعرض محرومان بمحرمان
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @martyrs and martyrdom, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
